configurePresets.name: ninja
configurePresets.description: Fast cross-platform build (Windows and Linux). Compiles all CUDA translation units in parallel (file-level) via the Ninja Multi-Config generator, unlike the Visual Studio generator which builds whole library projects one after another. Requires Ninja and the CUDA toolchain (nvcc) on PATH; on Windows it must additionally be run from an MSVC environment (e.g. via build-windows-ninja.bat).
